prompt: In image 1, add the warning popup from image 2 to the center of the map at the top, covering part of the street grid but not overlapping the vehicle options. Then insert the black location pin from image 3 on the left side of the orange “درخواست تپسی” (Request Tapsi) button. Leave everything else unchanged.
prompt_refined:
Edit `image 1` by performing the following modifications:
1.  Overlay the warning popup from `image 2` onto the map area at the top of `image 1`. Position it centrally on the map so it covers part of the street grid but does not overlap the vehicle options listed below the map.
2.  Insert the black location pin icon from `image 3` onto `image 1`, placing it immediately to the left of the orange 'درخواست تپسی' button.
Ensure no other parts of `image 1` are altered.
objects: Map with street grid and city names
Red and white warning popup, centrally located on the map
Exclamation mark icon within the warning popup
Vehicle options and prices (e.g., '۱۶۴,۰۰۰ تومان', '۲۱۴,۰۰۰ تومان', '۱۶۷,۰۰۰ تومان', '۱۳۴,۰۰۰ – ۱۵۴,۰۰۰ تومان')
Vehicle types and associated icons (e.g., 'عادی', 'تپسی پلاس', 'همیار (آزمایشی)', 'لاین')
Black location pin icon, immediately to the left of the orange 'درخواست تپسی' button
